title: Afolami, Bim -  Economic Secretary to the Treasury - ACOBA Advice
body: "Mr Afolami left his role at the Treasury in July 2024  Chief of Staff and Strategy, Acrisure, LLC  Mr Afolami sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Acrisure, LLC. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in February 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Board Member, Quoted Companies Alliance  Mr Afolami sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Quoted Companies Alliance. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in December 2024; the appointment was taken up in February 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Senior Adviser to the CEO, Peel Hunt  Mr Afolami sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Peel Hunt. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in October 2024; and the appointment was taken up in January 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Non Executive Director, HSBC UK  Mr Afolami sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with HSBC UK. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in December 2024; and the appointment was taken up in January 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  "
